## Pre-Entry Checklist (for each candidate)

Before acting on any of the above:

- [ ] Confirm price is **above the 50-day MA** in your broker's chart
- [ ] Confirm **no earnings** in the next 3 trading days (check Earnings Whispers or your broker)
- [ ] Confirm **RSI < 70** (not overbought on entry)
- [ ] Confirm **above-average volume** developing on the open
- [ ] S&P 500 above its 200-day MA (market regime filter — confirm at open)
